nasb.text: And he looked up and said, “I see men, for I see them like trees, walking around.”

esv.text: And he looked up and said, “I see people, but they look like trees, walking.”

cnv.text: 他往上一看，說：“我看見人了！看見他們好像樹走來走去。”

ccb.text: 他抬头看了看，说：“我看见人们好像一棵棵的树，走来走去。”

csbs.text: 他抬头一看，说：“我看见一些人！看起来好像树在走路！”
